allow: PowerShell($start = Get-Date; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\steamapps\\common\\wesnoth\\wesnoth.exe" -ArgumentList "-u","ai_training","--noreplaycheck","--nosound","--nomusic" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Host "STILL RUNNING after 8s, killing"; $proc.Kill\(\); } else { Write-Host "EXITED after $\(\([datetime]::Now - $start\).TotalSeconds\)s with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; })

PowerShell($before = Get-Date; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\steamapps\\common\\wesnoth\\wesnoth.exe" -ArgumentList "-u","ai_training","--noreplaycheck","--nosound","--nomusic" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\); Write-Host "killed"; } else { Write-Host "exited, code=$\($proc.ExitCode\)"; }; Write-Host "Files modified after $before :"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\My Games\\Wesnoth1.18" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt $before } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell($out = "$env:TEMP\\wes_stdout.txt"; $err = "$env:TEMP\\wes_stderr.txt"; Remove-Item $out,$err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\steamapps\\common\\wesnoth\\wesnoth.exe" -ArgumentList "-u","ai_training","--noreplaycheck","--nosound","--nomusic" -RedirectStandardOutput $out -RedirectStandardError $err -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host "killed after 15s" } else { Write-Host "exited code=$\($proc.ExitCode\)" }; Write-Host "--- STDOUT ---"; Get-Content $out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 50; Write-Host "--- STDERR ---"; Get-Content $err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 50)
